faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Harrison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Harrison typically cost between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points requiring sealing. This flat-rate pricing includes inspection, treatment, exclusion work, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Harrison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Harrison, NJ for rat emergencies. Our team understands that rat infestations require immediate attention and we prioritize rapid response to protect your property and health. Simply call us and we'll schedule the earliest available appointment.

faqs.question: What are signs of rats in my Harrison home or business?
faqs.answer: Common signs include droppings (dark, pellet-shaped), gnaw marks on wood or wires, scratching sounds in walls or ceilings at night, greasy rub marks along baseboards, and nesting materials like shredded paper. You may also notice a distinctive musky odor or see rats themselves, particularly at dusk or dawn.

faqs.question: Do you use safe rat extermination methods for Harrison homes with children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize the safety of your family and pets by using EPA-approved products and strategic placement of treatments in areas inaccessible to children and animals. Our technicians will explain all safety precautions and provide detailed instructions for before and after treatment to ensure complete peace of mind.
